resources.string:
Intent Transfer Demo is an Android application developed using Java and Android Studio to demonstrate Android Explicit Intents.

The application allows users to transfer text along with videos, images, and files between different Activities using Explicit Intents.

Users can enter:
• Name
• Email
• Contact Number
• Message

and transfer this information together with:
• Video
• Image
• Document

to dedicated preview screens.

This application is designed for Android learning, academic projects, and understanding Intent communication between Activities.

• Text & Video Transfer
• Text & Image Transfer
• Text & File Transfer
• Video Preview
• Image Preview
• File Preview
• Material Design 3 UI
• Bottom Navigation
• Light & Dark Theme
• Settings Screen
• About App
• Help Center
• Send Feedback
• Privacy Policy
• Terms & Conditions
• Responsive UI
• AndroidX Support

Language: Java
IDE: Android Studio
UI: Material Design 3
Architecture: Activity-Based Navigation
Media APIs: Activity Result API
Intent: Explicit Intent
Storage: SharedPreferences (Theme)
Minimum SDK: 24

1. Go to the Video tab.
2. Fill in the details.
3. Click 'Select Video' and pick a file.
4. Click 'Transfer & Preview'.

1. Go to the Image tab.
2. Fill in the details.
3. Click 'Select Image' and pick a photo.
4. Click 'Transfer & Preview'.

1. Go to the File tab.
2. Fill in the details.
3. Click 'Select File' and pick any supported document.
4. Click 'Transfer & Preview'.
PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX, XLS, XLSX, TXT, ZIP

Privacy Policy

Welcome to Intent Transfer Demo.

Your privacy is important to us. This application is designed for educational purposes and demonstrates Android Explicit Intents for transferring text, images, videos, and files between activities.

Information Collection
• This application does not collect, store, or transmit your personal information.
• Your Name, Email, Contact Number, and Message remain only on your device and are used temporarily for demonstration purposes.

Media & File Access
• Images, videos, and files are accessed only after your permission.
• Selected media is used only for preview and transfer within the application.
• No media or files are uploaded to any server.

Data Security
• All operations are performed locally on your device.
• No personal information is shared with third parties.

Permissions
The application may request permission to:
• Read images
• Read videos
• Read documents

These permissions are used only to allow you to select media and files.

Contact
For any questions or suggestions, contact:

ritish1808@gmail.com

Terms & Conditions

Welcome to Intent Transfer Demo.

By using this application, you agree to the following terms.

Application Usage
• This application is developed for educational and demonstration purposes.
• It demonstrates Android Explicit Intent communication between activities.

User Responsibility
• Users are responsible for the content they select and transfer.
• Do not use this application to share illegal or copyrighted content.

Privacy
• The application does not permanently store your personal information.
• All transfers occur locally within the application.

Permissions
• The application requires permission to access images, videos, and documents only after user approval.

Developer Liability
• The developer is not responsible for any data loss, accidental deletion, or misuse of files.
• Use the application at your own discretion.

Developer Contact

ritish1808@gmail.com
Transfer text data along with a video file using Intents.
Transfer text data along with an image file using Intents.
Transfer text data along with any file type using Intents.
No app found to open this file
Please fill all fields and select a file
